qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Consider the following decision problems: Does a given finite state machine accept a given string? Does a given context free grammar generate an infinite number of strings? Which of the following statements is true? A. Both and are decidable B. N e i t h e r nor is decidable C. Only is decidable D.
